title: The $20,000 API Key Mistake
summary: Keith AI presents a case study of a $20,000 incident involving improper API key handling. The video serves as a warning about the financial risks of security mismanagement in AI API usage.
writeup: Keith AI walks through a case study of a $20,000 incident caused by improper API key handling. The video frames the episode as a warning about the financial risks of security mismanagement in AI API usage. The core lesson centers on API access and cost controls: mishandled keys can translate directly into large, unexpected charges.
